description: Release gates for the paired functional benchmark. Primary (native_rebuild) must not regress against baseline (screenshot_dump).
notes: Deterministic functional benchmark (see references/fixture-benchmark.md): primary=native_rebuild, baseline=screenshot_dump (the non-editable anti-pattern this skill replaces). Gate-vs-bypass style, not a blind multi-model functional benchmark. Render-QA (soffice/pdftoppm) runs in the runtime sandbox.
